---
title: "home"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/grimmjulian
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/grimmjulian225/

---

I am Julian, and I want to talk about R, Nix and Developer Experience.

<!-- Services Section -->
::: {.services-section}

:::: {.services-grid}

::::: {.service-card}
<div class="service-icon">⚙️</div>
### R Process Optimization
Transform slow, memory-hungry scripts into lean, high-performance pipelines. From vectorization and parallelization to profiling bottlenecks — I help your R code run faster and scale further.

::: {.service-tags}
[profiling]{.tag} [parallelization]{.tag} [memory]{.tag}
:::
:::::

::::: {.service-card}
<div class="service-icon">📦</div>
### R Package Development
Turn your analysis or toolset into a robust, documented, and tested R package — ready for CRAN or internal distribution. Clean APIs, proper S3/S4 design, and full `testthat` coverage.

::: {.service-tags}
[CRAN-ready]{.tag} [roxygen2]{.tag} [testthat]{.tag}
:::
:::::

::::: {.service-card}
<div class="service-icon">✨</div>
### Shiny App Development
Build reactive, production-grade Shiny applications your stakeholders will actually want to use. From data explorers to operational dashboards — clean UI, modular structure, and deployment-ready.

::: {.service-tags}
[modules]{.tag} [deployment]{.tag} [bslib]{.tag}
:::
:::::

::::

:::
